programmes.show_description: Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when the ranch is threatened, the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. (2025)
A crime series actress returns to her home town where she encounters her first real case. Can her TV crime knowledge save the day? Mystery drama with Lyndie Greenwood. (2024)

Teleshopping.
On the eve of her sister's wedding, real estate agent Lisa must decide if developer Matthew Wallace holds the key to her heart. (2021)
Sparks fly as a single mother bumps into a professional American football player from her past at her daughter's playing field. Will the pair kick things off or fumble once more? (2024)
Sparks fly between a wedding guide creator and an uninspired artist as they renovate a run-down cottage for a couple's dream wedding. (2023)
When Madison travels to New Zealand to plan her best friend's wedding, she finds the perfect location, but loses her heart to the idyllic vineyard's owner. (2021)
Having given up on searching for the man of her dreams, Harriet is transported into the world of Pride and Prejudice to find one. No man can compare to Mr Darcy - can they? (2024)
Contest winners try to solve a fake murder for a grand prize, but the event goes awry when a real murder occurs and secrets are uncovered. Cozy crime thriller. (2025)
A travel writer goes to the Maldives to write a piece about a legendary shipwreck. But with the help of her underwater guide, she may discover true love instead of buried treasure. (2023)
When aspiring music producer Chloe lands her first gig working with former rising star Dustin, they race to create an epic song of the summer. (2024)
When Naima meets Damian after her interest in an undiscovered music group brings her to Nashville, their shared love of music blossoms into something more. (2023)
When a celebrity chef walks off his show, prep cook Anna must step into the spotlight and make the show her own, with the help of her Aussie cameraman and Portuguese location scout. (2023)
Theme Park performer Lacey becomes friends with eight-year-old princess Rose and is swept up in the royal world of luxury and nobility. Nichole Sakura stars. (2025)

When Lolly's Aunt Gert gives her three magical lemon drops, she gets to experience what her life would have been like if she had lived her unfulfilled dreams. (2023)
When Celeste loses her teaching job, her boss puts her forward for an au-pair job with infamous New York property tycoon Richard Trapp. (2024)
As the Easter holiday approaches, a woman rediscovers a blessing bracelet that helps restore her faith and renew her belief in love. (2023)
While staying at the Lemon Tree Farm, budding photographer Beck must save things from growing sour and help the handsome owner save his land. Zesty romance. (2022)
Busy events planner Emma doesn't have time for love, but could the charming best man at her sister's wedding convince her to give romance - and him - a second chance? (2022)
In the jungles of Saint Lucia, an ornithologist and journalist partner up to save an endangered species of bird. As both fall in love with nature, they begin to fall for each other. (2023)
Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when the ranch is threatened, the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. (2025)
With the promise of an inheritance from her grandfather spurring her, Emma promises to tutor a gifted violinist, unaware her grandfather is playing matchmaker from the grave. (2025)
The owner of a popular café could lose everything when a major celebrity is dumped there. Can she get him and his would-be-fiancee back together, or will she fall for him herself? (2023)
